title: athyrium × calophyllum
intro: Athyrium × calophyllum, also known as Lady fern, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between the Athyrium and Dryopteris species. This plant is believed to have medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Athyrium × calophyllum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory function, and act as a natural diuretic. Athyrium × calophyllum can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to harness its medicinal properties.
